body_excerpt: In uploadFile of FileUploadServiceImpl.java, there is a possible incorrect file access due to a confused deputy. This could lead to local information disclosure of private files with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
